goal: 修复 FEAT-052 CR 4个问题: ①mic切换effect竞态+内存泄漏 ②中断timer无cleanup ③handleEndCall依赖异常 ④fetchDevices重复

coverage_checklist.mic_cleanup: assert: mic切换有 AbortController 清理 + 可选链替代非空断言
coverage_checklist.timer_cleanup: assert: 中断横幅 timer 在 effect cleanup 中清除
coverage_checklist.endcall_ref: assert: handleEndCall cleanup 用 ref 持有避免依赖变化触发
coverage_checklist.dedup_fetch: assert: useCamera 消除重复 fetchDevices
